name: Ezra Bertaut
subtitle: temporary keeper of Frog Knows Best · the year

ultimate_ability.label: The Loop Closes
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Complete the daily-cycle instantly: feed all tanks, restock all pegboards, count the till, lock up. The CLOSURE track goes to zero. Not usable in the first three turns of any scenario · the loop has to be earned.

notes: Ezra's hand for the World arcana. CLOSURE is the second stat (renamed TEACHING / FIRST-MORNING NERVES per scenario). Scenarios: loop_completed (canonical), the_walk_through_with_the_new_tenants (easier handoff), the_year_ago_first_open (hardest · the year's template).
